commit.subject: LU-17739 build: Update ZFS version to 2.2.3
commit.message:
LU-17739 build: Update ZFS version to 2.2.3

Update ZFS version to 2.2.3. The changes are listed in:
https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/releases/tag/zfs-2.2.3

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el8.9 serverdistro=el8.9 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.3 serverdistro=el9.3 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-1

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-2

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-3

Change-Id: I2cfe72ba66fe6e6cc28f80b07ad8fc767ee2d348
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
